DISCOVERY 610, PLAINTIFF FRED LEVINSON'S MOTION TO DEEM CERTAIN MATTERS ADMITTED IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. MONETARY SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $440 SHALL BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE CHAN. NOT REPORTED.

IN DEPARTMENT 610. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT, NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
Ntc And Mtn For Order Establishing Admissions And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-17-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff Fred Levinson's motion to deem certain matters admitted is granted. No opposition has been filed. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $440 shall be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.

Ntc And Mtn For Order Establishing Admissions And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-06-2008 Continued To Nov-17-08 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Jak Marquez, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Fred Levinson
Luis Montoya, defendant and opposing party, in Propria Persona

After hearing, Plaintiff Fred Levinson's motion for order establishing admissions granted; the matters set forth in request for admission nos. 1 through 6, inclusive, and Request for sanctions is continued to November 17, 2008 at 10:30 a.m. in Department 610. Commissioner: Paul Slavit, not reported.
